title: GitHub - PersonalJarvis/PersonalJarvis: Voice-driven, cross-platform meta-orchestrator. Bring your own API keys.
excerpt: Voice-driven, cross-platform meta-orchestrator. Bring your own API keys. - PersonalJarvis/PersonalJarvis
content_html:
Talk to your computer — and watch it do the work: an open-source, privacy-first voice agent with full command of your PC.

Not a classical voice assistant: a fast Router-Brain listens, decides, and delegates — heavy work goes to interchangeable agent harnesses (Claude Code, Codex CLI, MCP, computer-use) that run isolated, get reviewed by a critic, and report back in your language. Provider-agnostic (Gemini, Claude, OpenAI, OpenRouter — one setting), self-modifying, and it runs everywhere — headless server to full voice desktop.

Just say it

You say What happens
"Research vector databases." An isolated agent digs in; the finished report lands as a download in Outputs.
"Call the clinic and book the next open appointment." A real outbound phone call goes out through the optional Twilio line.
"Remember: Alex prefers Signal over email." Written to the Knowledge Wiki — still known in every future session.
"When the download finishes, ping me on Telegram." A when-then trigger arms itself and messages you the moment it fires.
"Open the browser and pull up the weather." Jarvis takes mouse and keyboard and does it on your screen.

Every one of these works today, out of the box.

See it in action

One voice command, and the Router-Brain takes the screen and does it live · watch the full demo on YouTube

Why it's different
Never blocks A sub-second Ack-Brain replies while the deep brain still thinks.
Meta-orchestrator A lean Router dispatches to specialized harnesses, not one giant prompt.
Self-healing Missions run in isolated worktrees; a critic reviews before you hear it.
Provider-agnostic Gemini, Claude, OpenAI, OpenRouter — switch by voice, smart fallback.
Your plan or key Run agents on a subscription login or a pay-per-token key.
Self-modifying Rewrites its own settings through a reversible, audited pipeline.
Lasting memory A Knowledge Wiki + awareness build a model of you across sessions.
Runs anywhere Headless Linux server to full voice desktop; local parts degrade.

How it works

Higher layers reach lower layers only through protocols; everything else talks over a typed, immutable EventBus — that strict seam is what lets harnesses, providers, and plugins be swapped freely.

The 8-layer map 
L7  UI/UX           Desktop app (FastAPI + React + pywebview), tray, Orb overlay
L6  Orchestrator    State machine, Router, BrainManager, Mission-Manager, Controller
L5  Harness adapter Claude Code, Codex, Open Interpreter, MCP, raw computer-use
L4  Brain           Gemini · Claude · OpenAI · Grok · OpenRouter  +  sub-second Ack-Brain
L3  Intent / Risk   Classifier, four-tier risk policy, approval, rate-limit tracking
L2  Speech          Wake → VAD → STT → TTS  (cloud or local, your choice)
L1  Audio I/O       Device routing, chime feedback
L0  OS / Hardware   Mic, speakers, global hotkeys, optional GPU

A deeper engineering map — anti-patterns, bug classes, phase status with file:line references — lives in docs/LLM-CONTEXT.md.

Install

One command on Windows, macOS, or Linux. You need Python 3.11+ and Git — the installer checks both and stops with a download link if one is missing. It asks nothing in the terminal, launches the app, and the app walks you through a one-time setup (language, wake word, API keys). Bring your own keys; nothing is bundled.

Windows — PowerShell

irm https://raw.githubusercontent.com/PersonalJarvis/PersonalJarvis/main/install/install.ps1 | iex

macOS · Linux

curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/PersonalJarvis/PersonalJarvis/main/install/install.sh | bash

Open source — read the installer before you run it. It only creates a venv, installs dependencies, prefetches the voice models, and launches the app. Keys land in your OS credential manager, never in the repo. Re-running the same one-liner updates in place.

Uninstall — one command as well. Removes the install folder, the autostart entry, and the keychain entries; add --dry-run to preview, --yes to skip the confirmation:

# Windows (PowerShell)
& "$env:USERPROFILE\.personal-jarvis\install\uninstall.ps1"
# macOS · Linux
bash ~/.personal-jarvis/install/uninstall.sh

Both run the uninstaller that is already on your disk. If it is missing or refuses to start — installs from 1.1.0 / 1.1.1 shipped one that could not run on macOS at all — skip it and use the app's own uninstall directly. Same job, no bootstrap involved; add --dry-run first to see what it would remove:

# macOS · Linux
~/.personal-jarvis/.venv/bin/python -m jarvis --uninstall
# Windows (PowerShell)
& "$env:USERPROFILE\.personal-jarvis\.venv\Scripts\python.exe" -m jarvis --uninstall
Optional extras, install flags, pipx & manual clone

Everything below is optional — each item only unlocks a specific feature:

Optional Unlocks
A provider API key or subscription login — Gemini, Claude, OpenAI, or OpenRouter Actually talking to a brain. The in-app setup stores it in your OS credential manager.
Node.js 18+ The coding-agent worker CLIs (Claude Code, Codex) heavy missions delegate to. Add it any time.
libportaudio (Linux only) Local microphone and speakers (apt install libportaudio2).
A GPU Faster fully-offline speech; everything also runs on CPU.
Install flag Effect
--headless Minimal server install: API + WebSocket only, torch-free base, no Node.js — the tiny-VPS path
--no-launch Install only; don't start the app

pipx — isolated, no clone, any OS:

pipx install "git+https://github.com/PersonalJarvis/PersonalJarvis" && jarvis serve

Manual — clone it, read every line, then run:

git clone https://github.com/PersonalJarvis/PersonalJarvis
cd PersonalJarvis
python -m venv .venv && source .venv/bin/activate   # Windows: .\.venv\Scripts\Activate.ps1
pip install -e .[full]
jarvis serve

Run it

jarvis          # full desktop: window + voice + Orb overlay
jarvis serve    # headless server: API + WebSocket + browser UI, no local audio needed

Headless / server notes

On a server, open http://localhost:47821 — the full experience lives in the browser, including voice through the browser microphone. The one-time setup runs there too; you can also set a provider key (e.g. GEMINI_API_KEY) in the environment or a .env file.

Browser microphone access needs a secure context: localhost works as-is; for a remote VPS, terminate TLS with an HTTPS reverse proxy (Caddy, Nginx) — plain http://server-ip stays usable for text, but browsers block voice.

What's inside

Missions — the self-healing work loop. Anything non-trivial ("research X and write me a report") spawns a worker in an isolated git worktree — a private sandbox copy of the workspace, with crash containment. A critic reviews the result (up to three rounds) before you ever hear it; deliverables land in Outputs as downloadable files.

Knowledge Wiki — memory that survives. An Obsidian-compatible Markdown vault Jarvis reads and writes. Tell it something once and every future session knows. It's plain files on your disk — read it, edit it, sync it, own it.

Computer use. Jarvis takes the mouse and keyboard when you ask: open apps, click, type, navigate — with an on-screen action border so you always see when it's driving.

Channels & telephony. Desktop window, browser, Telegram, and Discord all reach the same brain and share the same memory. Optional Twilio integration makes real outbound phone calls.

Safety tiers. Every action is classified safe / monitor / ask / block before it runs — destructive things ask first, whitelisted routines stop nagging you, and the blacklist always outranks the whitelist.

Self-modification. It can change its own settings by voice — through a guarded pipeline (validate → backup → apply → verify → roll back on failure) with a full audit trail. Generated skills always land as drafts for your review; nothing self-activates.

Realtime voice. Optional speech-to-speech mode (OpenAI Realtime, Gemini Live) for sub-second conversational latency — with automatic fallback to the classic wake → STT → brain → TTS pipeline when it's unavailable.

Drive it from the terminal

The jarvis CLI (aliases jarvisctl, jctl) controls a running instance — the same actions as the app, behind the same safety checks, just scriptable. Anything you can click, you (or your scripts, or another coding agent) can type:

jarvis system status          # {"reachable": true} when Jarvis is up
jarvis --json brain status    # which provider is live, as machine-readable JSON
jarvis api <tag> <op>         # EVERY REST endpoint, auto-generated from OpenAPI

It's a thin client over the local REST API (127.0.0.1:47821), so it inherits every guardrail — risk tiers, atomic config writes, the audit log — rather than bypassing them. Full guide: docs/jarvis-cli.md.

Configuration

Zero config files needed — every setting has a built-in default and the one-time in-app setup covers the rest. For fine control there's one optional, documented file (jarvis.toml.example):

[profile]
language = "auto"          # de | en | auto — bilingual auto-detect

[trigger.wake_word]
phrase = ""                # YOUR word — nothing is preset for you
engine = "auto"            # resolves the best engine for your phrase

[stt]
provider = "groq-api"      # or openai-api, openrouter-stt, deepgram-…

[tts]
provider = "gemini-flash-tts"
fallback = "grok-voice"    # cross-provider fallback is the norm everywhere

Overrides cascade jarvis.toml → ENV (JARVIS__SECTION__KEY=…). Secrets never go in this file — API keys live in your OS credential manager (or .env), entered in-app.

Privacy

  • Keys stay yours — stored in the OS credential manager, never in the repo, never in a file you could accidentally commit.
  • The always-on part is local — wake-word listening runs entirely on your machine; audio only goes to a cloud STT provider after you've addressed Jarvis, and only if you chose a cloud provider.
  • Local per stage, your choice — speech recognition can run fully offline ([local-voice] extra); brain and voice output use whichever provider you configure.
  • Memory is plain files — the Knowledge Wiki is Markdown on your disk, not a hosted database.

Extend it

Every pluggable part is a Python entry point: write a class against the protocols in jarvis/core/protocols.py, register one line in pyproject.toml, reinstall — no fork, no core edits.

Plugin group What you can add
jarvis.brain A new LLM provider
jarvis.stt / jarvis.tts Speech recognition / synthesis backends
jarvis.wakeword Wake-word engines
jarvis.realtime Speech-to-speech providers
jarvis.harness Agent harnesses missions delegate to
jarvis.tool Actions the router can call directly
jarvis.channel New surfaces — chat platforms, transports

Three rules keep it stable: implement the protocol, stream everything (AsyncIterator — non-streaming yields one element), and pass the contract suite (pytest tests/contract/). The deep engineering map — anti-patterns, recurring bug classes, phase status — lives in docs/LLM-CONTEXT.md, built to be pasted into an LLM chat whole.

Project structure 
PersonalJarvis/
├── jarvis/          # The application — every core package (brain, speech, missions, memory, UI server…)
├── ui/              # Orb overlay for the desktop; loaded by jarvis at runtime
├── OS-Level/        # Edge-glow overlay process — action border, mascot, cursor trail
├── board-backend/   # Standalone federation service (verifies signed Board aggregates)
├── conductor/       # YAML-first agentic-workflow canvas, mounted inside the app
├── wiki/            # Seed knowledge vault (Obsidian-compatible), created on first run
├── install/         # One-line installers + signed-release verification (cosign / TUF)
├── tests/           # Unit, integration, contract, and end-to-end suites
├── docs/            # Architecture docs, ADRs, the philosophy, design specs
├── assets/          # Brand art, banner, screenshots
├── .github/         # CI workflows + issue / pull-request templates
├── scoop-bucket/    # Windows install manifest (Scoop)
├── homebrew-tap/    # macOS install formula (Homebrew)
└── README · LICENSE · CODE_OF_CONDUCT · CONTRIBUTING · SECURITY · CHANGELOG

Inside jarvis/, the layout mirrors the 8-layer model — jarvis/brain/ (providers + router), jarvis/speech/ (wake → VAD → STT → TTS), jarvis/missions/ (the self-healing Worker-Critic), jarvis/memory/wiki/ (long-term memory), jarvis/ui/web/ (the desktop app).

Documentation

Document What's in it
docs/architecture-overview.md The full architecture — layers, module catalog, data flow
docs/LLM-CONTEXT.md Dense project snapshot, built to paste into an LLM chat whole
CLAUDE.md Binding contributor guide — conventions, doctrine, anti-patterns
docs/PHILOSOPHY.md Cross-platform, provider-agnostic design doctrine
docs/adr/ Architecture Decision Records
docs/BUGS.md The recurring-bug register
docs/BRAND.md Brand guidelines — colors, typography, the wordmark

Community

Personal Jarvis is built in the open — the roadmap, the bug hunts, and the wins all land on Discord first. Come say hi and help shape where it goes.

Discord · @Ruben_Luetke · Instagram · GitHub

Contributing

Pull requests are welcome — CONTRIBUTING.md has the full guide. The short version: artifacts are English, read CLAUDE.md before larger changes, new providers must pass pytest tests/contract/, and security issues go to SECURITY.md privately.

License

MIT — free to use, modify, and distribute, including commercially; see LICENSE. Third-party names and logos belong to their owners — see TRADEMARK.md.

blocks.html_en: On a server, open http://localhost:47821 — the full experience lives in the browser, including voice through the browser microphone. The one-time setup runs there too; you can also set a provider key (e.g. GEMINI_API_KEY) in the environment or a .env file.

sentences.en: Browser microphone access needs a secure context: localhost works as-is; for a remote VPS, terminate TLS with an HTTPS reverse proxy (Caddy, Nginx) — plain http://server-ip stays usable for text, but browsers block voice.
sentences.zh: 浏览器麦克风访问需要安全上下文：本地主机按原样工作；对于远程 VPS，使用 HTTPS 反向代理（Caddy、Nginx）终止 TLS — 普通的 http://server-ip 仍然可用于文本，但浏览器会阻止语音。

sentences.en: What's inside
sentences.zh: 里面有什么

blocks.html_en: Missions — the self-healing work loop. Anything non-trivial ("research X and write me a report") spawns a worker in an isolated git worktree — a private sandbox copy of the workspace, with crash containment. A critic reviews the result (up to three rounds) before you ever hear it; deliverables land in Outputs as downloadable files.

sentences.en: Missions — the self-healing work loop.
sentences.zh: 使命——自我修复的工作循环。

sentences.en: Anything non-trivial ("research X and write me a report") spawns a worker in an isolated git worktree — a private sandbox copy of the workspace, with crash containment.
sentences.zh: 任何不平凡的事情（“研究 X 并给我写一份报告”）都会在一个隔离的 git 工作树中生成一个工作人员——工作区的私人沙箱副本，具有崩溃遏制功能。

sentences.en: A critic reviews the result (up to three rounds) before you ever hear it; deliverables land in Outputs as downloadable files.
sentences.zh: 在您听到结果之前，评论家会审查结果（最多三轮）；可交付成果以可下载文件的形式出现在输出中。

blocks.html_en: Knowledge Wiki — memory that survives. An Obsidian-compatible Markdown vault Jarvis reads and writes. Tell it something once and every future session knows. It's plain files on your disk — read it, edit it, sync it, own it.

sentences.en: Knowledge Wiki — memory that survives.
sentences.zh: 知识维基 — 幸存的记忆。

sentences.en: An Obsidian-compatible Markdown vault Jarvis reads and writes.
sentences.zh: Jarvis 可以读取和写入与黑曜石兼容的 Markdown 库。

sentences.en: Tell it something once and every future session knows.
sentences.zh: 告诉它一次，以后的每次会议都会知道。

sentences.en: It's plain files on your disk — read it, edit it, sync it, own it.
sentences.zh: 它是磁盘上的纯文件 - 读取它、编辑它、同步它、拥有它。

blocks.html_en: Computer use. Jarvis takes the mouse and keyboard when you ask: open apps, click, type, navigate — with an on-screen action border so you always see when it's driving.

sentences.en: Computer use.
sentences.zh: 电脑使用。

sentences.en: Jarvis takes the mouse and keyboard when you ask: open apps, click, type, navigate — with an on-screen action border so you always see when it's driving.
sentences.zh: 当您询问时，贾维斯会拿起鼠标和键盘：打开应用程序、单击、键入、导航 - 带有屏幕上的操作边框，以便您始终可以看到它何时在行驶。

blocks.html_en: Channels & telephony. Desktop window, browser, Telegram, and Discord all reach the same brain and share the same memory. Optional Twilio integration makes real outbound phone calls.

sentences.en: Channels & telephony.
sentences.zh: 频道和电话。

sentences.en: Desktop window, browser, Telegram, and Discord all reach the same brain and share the same memory.
sentences.zh: 桌面窗口、浏览器、Telegram 和 Discord 都到达同一个大脑并共享相同的内存。

sentences.en: Optional Twilio integration makes real outbound phone calls.
sentences.zh: 可选的 Twilio 集成可实现真正的外拨电话。

blocks.html_en: Safety tiers. Every action is classified safe / monitor / ask / block before it runs — destructive things ask first, whitelisted routines stop nagging you, and the blacklist always outranks the whitelist.

sentences.en: Safety tiers.
sentences.zh: 安全等级。

sentences.en: Every action is classified safe / monitor / ask / block before it runs — destructive things ask first, whitelisted routines stop nagging you, and the blacklist always outranks the whitelist.
sentences.zh: 每个操作在运行之前都会被分类为安全/监视/询问/阻止 - 破坏性的事情首先询问，白名单例程不再烦扰您，黑名单总是优先于白名单。

blocks.html_en: Self-modification. It can change its own settings by voice — through a guarded pipeline (validate → backup → apply → verify → roll back on failure) with a full audit trail. Generated skills always land as drafts for your review; nothing self-activates.

sentences.en: Self-modification.
sentences.zh: 自我改造。

sentences.en: It can change its own settings by voice — through a guarded pipeline (validate → backup → apply → verify → roll back on failure) with a full audit trail.
sentences.zh: 它可以通过语音更改自己的设置 - 通过受保护的管道（验证→备份→应用→验证→失败时回滚）并具有完整的审计跟踪。

sentences.en: Generated skills always land as drafts for your review; nothing self-activates.
sentences.zh: 生成的技能始终作为草稿供您审阅；没有任何东西会自动激活。

blocks.html_en: Realtime voice. Optional speech-to-speech mode (OpenAI Realtime, Gemini Live) for sub-second conversational latency — with automatic fallback to the classic wake → STT → brain → TTS pipeline when it's unavailable.

sentences.en: Realtime voice.
sentences.zh: 实时语音。

sentences.en: Optional speech-to-speech mode (OpenAI Realtime, Gemini Live) for sub-second conversational latency — with automatic fallback to the classic wake → STT → brain → TTS pipeline when it's unavailable.
sentences.zh: 可选的语音到语音模式（OpenAI Realtime、Gemini Live）可实现亚秒级对话延迟 - 在不可用时自动回退到经典唤醒 → STT → 大脑 → TTS 管道。

sentences.zh: 从终端驱动它

blocks.html_en: It's a thin client over the local REST API (127.0.0.1:47821), so it inherits every guardrail — risk tiers, atomic config writes, the audit log — rather than bypassing them. Full guide: docs/jarvis-cli.md.

sentences.en: It's a thin client over the local REST API (127.0.0.1:47821), so it inherits every guardrail — risk tiers, atomic config writes, the audit log — rather than bypassing them.
sentences.zh: 它是本地 REST API (127.0.0.1:47821) 上的瘦客户端，因此它继承了每个护栏 - 风险层、原子配置写入、审核日志 - 而不是绕过它们。

sentences.en: Full guide: docs/jarvis-cli.md.
sentences.zh: 完整指南：docs/jarvis-cli.md。

sentences.en: Zero config files needed — every setting has a built-in default and the one-time in-app setup covers the rest.
sentences.zh: 需要零配置文件 - 每个设置都有一个内置默认值，一次性应用内设置涵盖了其余设置。

sentences.en: For fine control there's one optional, documented file (jarvis.toml.example):
sentences.zh: 为了进行精细控制，有一个可选的记录文件（jarvis.toml.example）：

blocks.html_en: Overrides cascade jarvis.toml → ENV (JARVIS__SECTION__KEY=…). Secrets never go in this file — API keys live in your OS credential manager (or .env), entered in-app.

sentences.en: Overrides cascade jarvis.toml → ENV (JARVIS__SECTION__KEY=…).
sentences.zh: 覆盖级联 jarvis.toml → ENV (JARVIS__SECTION__KEY=...)。

sentences.en: Secrets never go in this file — API keys live in your OS credential manager (or .env), entered in-app.
sentences.zh: 秘密永远不会进入此文件 - API 密钥位于您的操作系统凭证管理器（或 .env）中，在应用程序内输入。

sentences.en: Privacy
sentences.zh: 隐私

blocks.html_en: • Keys stay yours — stored in the OS credential manager, never in the repo, never in a file you could accidentally commit.

sentences.en: Keys stay yours — stored in the OS credential manager, never in the repo, never in a file you could accidentally commit.
sentences.zh: 密钥归您所有 - 存储在操作系统凭证管理器中，永远不会存储在存储库中，也永远不会存储在您可能意外提交的文件中。

blocks.html_en: • The always-on part is local — wake-word listening runs entirely on your machine; audio only goes to a cloud STT provider after you've addressed Jarvis, and only if you chose a cloud provider.

content_html_zh:
与您的计算机交谈 - 并观察它的工作：一个开源、隐私第一的语音代理，可以完全控制您的 PC。

不是一个传统的语音助手：一个快速的路由器大脑负责倾听、决定和委托——繁重的工作交给可互换的代理工具（Claude Code、Codex CLI、MCP、计算机使用），这些工具独立运行，接受评论家的审查，并用您的语言返回报告。 与提供商无关（Gemini、Claude、OpenAI、OpenRouter - 一种设置）、自我修改，并且它可以在任何地方运行 - 从无头服务器到完整的语音桌面。

就说吧

你说 会发生什么
“研究载体数据库。” 一名孤立的特工潜入；完成的报告可在输出中下载。
“打电话给诊所并预约下一次开放预约。” 真正的出站电话通过可选的 Twilio 线路拨出。
“记住：相对于电子邮件，Alex 更喜欢 Signal。” 写入知识维基——在未来的每次会议中仍然已知。
“下载完成后，请通过 Telegram 联系我。” 何时-然后触发器会自动武装起来，并在触发时向您发送消息。
“打开浏览器，调出天气。” 贾维斯使用鼠标和键盘在屏幕上进行操作。

如今，这些产品中的每一项都可以开箱即用。

查看实际效果

只需一个语音命令，Router-Brain 就会截取屏幕并进行实时操作 · 在 YouTube 上观看完整演示

为什么不一样
从不阻塞 当深层大脑仍在思考时，亚秒级的 Ack-Brain 就会做出回应。
元编曲家 一台精简的路由器会分派到专门的线束，而不是一个巨大的提示。
自愈 任务在隔离的工作树中运行；评论家在你听到之前就评论了。
与提供商无关 Gemini、Claude、OpenAI、OpenRouter — 通过语音切换、智能回退。
您的计划或钥匙 在订阅登录或按令牌付费密钥上运行代理。
自我修改 通过可逆的、经过审核的管道重写自己的设置。
持久记忆 知识维基+意识在各个会话中构建了您的模型。
随处运行 从无头 Linux 服务器到完整语音桌面；局部部件退化。

它是如何运作的

高层只能通过协议到达下层；其他一切都通过类型化、不可变的 EventBus 进行讨论——这种严格的接缝使得工具、提供程序和插件可以自由交换。

The 8-layer map 
L7  UI/UX           Desktop app (FastAPI + React + pywebview), tray, Orb overlay
L6  Orchestrator    State machine, Router, BrainManager, Mission-Manager, Controller
L5  Harness adapter Claude Code, Codex, Open Interpreter, MCP, raw computer-use
L4  Brain           Gemini · Claude · OpenAI · Grok · OpenRouter  +  sub-second Ack-Brain
L3  Intent / Risk   Classifier, four-tier risk policy, approval, rate-limit tracking
L2  Speech          Wake → VAD → STT → TTS  (cloud or local, your choice)
L1  Audio I/O       Device routing, chime feedback
L0  OS / Hardware   Mic, speakers, global hotkeys, optional GPU

更深入的工程图 - 反模式、错误类、带有文件：行引用的阶段状态 - 位于 docs/LLM-CONTEXT.md 中。

安装

Windows、macOS 或 Linux 上的一个命令。 您需要 Python 3.11+ 和 Git — 安装程序会检查两者，如果缺少其中一个，则会停止并显示下载链接。 它在终端中不询问任何内容，启动应用程序，应用程序将引导您完成一次性设置（语言、唤醒词、API 密钥）。 带上自己的钥匙；没有捆绑任何东西。

Windows——PowerShell

irm https://raw.githubusercontent.com/PersonalJarvis/PersonalJarvis/main/install/install.ps1 | iex

macOS·Linux

curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/PersonalJarvis/PersonalJarvis/main/install/install.sh | bash
开源 — 在运行之前阅读安装程序。 它仅创建 venv、安装依赖项、预取语音模型并启动应用程序。 密钥位于操作系统凭证管理器中，而不是存储库中。 重新运行相同的单行更新。

卸载——也是一个命令。 删除安装文件夹、自动启动条目和钥匙串条目；添加 --dry-run 进行预览，--yes 跳过确认：

# Windows (PowerShell)
& "$env:USERPROFILE\.personal-jarvis\install\uninstall.ps1"
# macOS · Linux
bash ~/.personal-jarvis/install/uninstall.sh

两者都运行磁盘上已有的卸载程序。 如果它丢失或拒绝启动 - 从 1.1.0 / 1.1.1 发布的安装根本无法在 macOS 上运行 - 跳过它并直接使用应用程序自己的卸载。 同样的工作，不涉及引导程序；首先添加 --dry-run 看看它会删除什么：

# macOS · Linux
~/.personal-jarvis/.venv/bin/python -m jarvis --uninstall
# Windows (PowerShell)
& "$env:USERPROFILE\.personal-jarvis\.venv\Scripts\python.exe" -m jarvis --uninstall
Optional extras, install flags, pipx & manual clone

以下所有内容都是可选的 - 每个项目仅解锁一个特定功能：

选修的 解锁
提供商 API 密钥或订阅登录名 — Gemini、Claude、OpenAI 或 OpenRouter 实际上是在和大脑说话。 应用程序内设置将其存储在您的操作系统凭据管理器中。
Node.js 18+ 编码代理工作者 CLI（Claude Code、Codex）委托给了繁重的任务。 随时添加。
libportaudio（仅限 Linux） 本地麦克风和扬声器（apt install libportaudio2）。
A GPU 更快的完全离线语音；一切也都在CPU上运行。
安装标志 影响
--无头 最小服务器安装：仅 API + WebSocket、无火炬基础、无 Node.js — tiny-VPS 路径
--不启动 仅安装；不要启动应用程序

pipx — 隔离，无克隆，任何操作系统：

pipx install "git+https://github.com/PersonalJarvis/PersonalJarvis" && jarvis serve

手动 — 克隆它，读取每一行，然后运行：

git clone https://github.com/PersonalJarvis/PersonalJarvis
cd PersonalJarvis
python -m venv .venv && source .venv/bin/activate   # Windows: .\.venv\Scripts\Activate.ps1
pip install -e .[full]
jarvis serve

Run it

jarvis          # full desktop: window + voice + Orb overlay
jarvis serve    # headless server: API + WebSocket + browser UI, no local audio needed

Headless / server notes

在服务器上，打开 http://localhost:47821 — 完整体验位于浏览器中，包括通过浏览器麦克风发出的语音。 一次性设置也在那里运行；您还可以在环境或 .env 文件中设置提供程序密钥（例如 GEMINI_API_KEY）。

浏览器麦克风访问需要安全上下文：本地主机按原样工作；对于远程 VPS，使用 HTTPS 反向代理（Caddy、Nginx）终止 TLS — 普通的 http://server-ip 仍然可用于文本，但浏览器会阻止语音。

里面有什么

使命——自我修复的工作循环。 任何不平凡的事情（“研究 X 并给我写一份报告”）都会在一个隔离的 git 工作树中生成一个工作人员——工作区的私人沙箱副本，具有崩溃遏制功能。 在您听到结果之前，评论家会审查结果（最多三轮）；可交付成果以可下载文件的形式出现在输出中。

知识维基 — 幸存的记忆。 Jarvis 可以读取和写入与黑曜石兼容的 Markdown 库。 告诉它一次，以后的每次会议都会知道。 它是磁盘上的纯文件 - 读取它、编辑它、同步它、拥有它。

电脑使用。 当您询问时，贾维斯会拿起鼠标和键盘：打开应用程序、单击、键入、导航 - 带有屏幕上的操作边框，以便您始终可以看到它何时在行驶。

频道和电话。 桌面窗口、浏览器、Telegram 和 Discord 都到达同一个大脑并共享相同的内存。 可选的 Twilio 集成可实现真正的外拨电话。

安全等级。 每个操作在运行之前都会被分类为安全/监视/询问/阻止 - 破坏性的事情首先询问，白名单例程不再烦扰您，黑名单总是优先于白名单。

自我改造。 它可以通过语音更改自己的设置 - 通过受保护的管道（验证→备份→应用→验证→失败时回滚）并具有完整的审计跟踪。 生成的技能始终作为草稿供您审阅；没有任何东西会自动激活。

实时语音。 可选的语音到语音模式（OpenAI Realtime、Gemini Live）可实现亚秒级对话延迟 - 在不可用时自动回退到经典唤醒 → STT → 大脑 → TTS 管道。

从终端驱动它

jarvis CLI（别名 jarvisctl、jctl）控制正在运行的实例 - 与应用程序相同的操作，同样的安全检查，只是可编写脚本。 您（或您的脚本或其他编码代理）可以单击任何可以单击的内容，然后键入：

jarvis system status          # {"reachable": true} when Jarvis is up
jarvis --json brain status    # which provider is live, as machine-readable JSON
jarvis api <tag> <op>         # EVERY REST endpoint, auto-generated from OpenAPI

它是本地 REST API (127.0.0.1:47821) 上的瘦客户端，因此它继承了每个护栏 - 风险层、原子配置写入、审核日志 - 而不是绕过它们。 完整指南：docs/jarvis-cli.md。

配置

需要零配置文件 - 每个设置都有一个内置默认值，一次性应用内设置涵盖了其余设置。 为了进行精细控制，有一个可选的记录文件（jarvis.toml.example）：

[profile]
language = "auto"          # de | en | auto — bilingual auto-detect

[trigger.wake_word]
phrase = ""                # YOUR word — nothing is preset for you
engine = "auto"            # resolves the best engine for your phrase

[stt]
provider = "groq-api"      # or openai-api, openrouter-stt, deepgram-…

[tts]
provider = "gemini-flash-tts"
fallback = "grok-voice"    # cross-provider fallback is the norm everywhere

覆盖级联 jarvis.toml → ENV (JARVIS__SECTION__KEY=...)。 秘密永远不会进入此文件 - API 密钥位于您的操作系统凭证管理器（或 .env）中，在应用程序内输入。

隐私

  • 密钥归您所有 - 存储在操作系统凭证管理器中，永远不会存储在存储库中，也永远不会存储在您可能意外提交的文件中。
  • 始终在线的部分是本地的——唤醒词监听完全在您的机器上运行；仅当您与 Jarvis 联系后，并且仅当您选择了云提供商时，音频才会发送至云 STT 提供商。
  • 每个阶段本地化，您的选择 - 语音识别可以完全离线运行（[本地语音]额外）；大脑和语音输出使用您配置的任何提供商。
  • 内存是纯文件 - 知识维基是磁盘上的 Markdown，而不是托管数据库。

延长它

每个可插入部分都是一个 Python 入口点：根据 jarvis/core/protocols.py 中的协议编写一个类，在 pyproject.toml 中注册一行，重新安装 - 无需分叉，无需核心编辑。

插件组 您可以添加什么
贾维斯大脑 新的法学硕士提供商
贾维斯.stt / 贾维斯.tts 语音识别/合成后端
贾维斯唤醒词 唤醒词引擎
贾维斯实时 语音转语音提供商
贾维斯·马具 代理利用任务委托给
贾维斯工具 路由器可以直接调用的动作
jarvis.channel 新界面——聊天平台、交通工具

三个规则使其保持稳定：实现协议、流式传输所有内容（AsyncIterator - 非流式传输产生一个元素）以及通过合约套件（pytest测试/合约/）。 深层工程图（反模式、重复出现的错误类、阶段状态）位于 docs/LLM-CONTEXT.md 中，旨在粘贴到整个 LLM 聊天中。

Project structure 
PersonalJarvis/
├── jarvis/          # The application — every core package (brain, speech, missions, memory, UI server…)
├── ui/              # Orb overlay for the desktop; loaded by jarvis at runtime
├── OS-Level/        # Edge-glow overlay process — action border, mascot, cursor trail
├── board-backend/   # Standalone federation service (verifies signed Board aggregates)
├── conductor/       # YAML-first agentic-workflow canvas, mounted inside the app
├── wiki/            # Seed knowledge vault (Obsidian-compatible), created on first run
├── install/         # One-line installers + signed-release verification (cosign / TUF)
├── tests/           # Unit, integration, contract, and end-to-end suites
├── docs/            # Architecture docs, ADRs, the philosophy, design specs
├── assets/          # Brand art, banner, screenshots
├── .github/         # CI workflows + issue / pull-request templates
├── scoop-bucket/    # Windows install manifest (Scoop)
├── homebrew-tap/    # macOS install formula (Homebrew)
└── README · LICENSE · CODE_OF_CONDUCT · CONTRIBUTING · SECURITY · CHANGELOG

在 jarvis/ 内部，布局反映了 8 层模型——jarvis/brain/（提供程序 + 路由器）、jarvis/speech/（唤醒 → VAD → STT → TTS）、jarvis/missions/（自我修复 Worker-Critic）、jarvis/memory/wiki/（长期记忆）、jarvis/ui/web/（桌面应用程序）。
